title: Mojtaba unchained: Why Europe must stay the course on Iran
summary_full: Despite higher energy prices and other challenges, leaving the war in Iran unfinished would only make Europe more exposed to the Iranian threat
summary_public: Despite higher energy prices and other challenges, leaving the war in Iran unfinished would only make Europe more exposed to the Iranian threat
